note: CRITICAL ERROR — ALMM scope is wrong. Official MNRE ALMM page (mnre.gov.in/en/approved-list-of-models-and-manufacturers-almm/, confirmed live 2026-06-11) defines: List-I = Solar PV Modules; List-II = Solar PV Cells (mandatory from 2026-06-01). There is NO ALMM list for inverters under the official MNRE ALMM Order as of 2026-06-11. The fragment claims ALMM List-II covers inverters — this is factually incorrect based on official MNRE source. A third-party rooftop-solar guide (surgepv.com) mentions an 'ALMM List II' requirement for inverters under PM Surya Ghar but cites no MNRE order number; it may confuse BIS CRS registration with a distinct ALMM listing, or refer to an unpublished internal MNRE portal requirement. This claim requires direct MNRE verification. Source URL dead: https://mnre.gov.in/solar-energy/approved-list-of-models-manufacturers-almm/ returns HTTP 404. Correct URL: https://mnre.gov.in/en/approved-list-of-models-and-manufacturers-almm/

Standards content is partially outdated and scope limit is wrong. (1) BIS CRS for utility-interconnected PV inverters (Item 48, crsbis.in confirmed 2026-06-11) now requires THREE standards: IS 16221 (Part 2):2015/IEC 62109-2:2011 + IS 16169:2019/IEC 62116:2014 + IS 17980:2022/IEC 62891:2020 — IS 17980 is missing from this fragment. Applications without IS 17980 test reports were only accepted up to 2025-07-27. (2) The '10 kVA' power limit stated in summary is not supported by current BIS CRS product listing which does not specify a kVA cap for utility-interconnected PV inverters; BIS-recognised labs test up to 50 kW. Source URL https://www.bis.gov.in/compulsory-registration-scheme/ resolves to BIS homepage, not a dedicated CRS product page — it is a soft-404 (navigable but not a direct CRS page). Canonical product list URL: https://www.crsbis.in/BIS/products-bis.do

Regulatory substance is broadly correct — BIS CRS registration (IS 16221, IS 16169) is a prerequisite for MNRE subsidy eligibility and grid-connection. CEA connectivity compliance is confirmed as a separate requirement. However, the specific MNRE order number is unconfirmed in fragment and in official searches. Source URL https://mnre.gov.in/solar/rooftop/ returns HTTP 404. Replacement URL for MNRE rooftop programme: https://mnre.gov.in/en/solar/rooftop/ (not verified to resolve — use mnre.gov.in/en/ as fallback).

Ongoing BIS CRS compliance obligations (BIS Act 2016 Section 17, BIS Conformity Assessment Regulations 2018) are correctly described. 2-year renewal period and factory surveillance are confirmed. Source URL https://www.bis.gov.in/conformity-assessment/compulsory-registration-scheme/ resolves to BIS homepage (soft-redirect), not a dedicated page, but the domain and publisher are official and correct. Better URL: https://www.crsbis.in/BIS/whatisCRS.do

CEA Technical Standards for Connectivity to the Grid Regulations 2007 are confirmed to exist at cea.nic.in (confirmed via search 2026-06-11). Fragment states 'amended 2013' but search results confirm there were also significant 2019 amendments covering renewable energy / inverter-based generation — the 2013 amendment year alone is incomplete/misleading. Source URL https://cea.nic.in/wp-content/uploads/regulation/2010/03/conn_stds.pdf returned a connection error (socket closed). Confirmed live regulation page: https://cea.nic.in/regulations/technical-standards-for-connectivity-to-the-grid-2007/?lang=en — this should replace the dead PDF URL.

IS 16169 = IEC 62116 (anti-islanding) is correctly stated. Current version is IS 16169:2019/IEC 62116:2014 (updated from 2014 edition). BIS CRS requirement for IS 16169 compliance is confirmed (crsbis.in product list, Item 48, implementation date 30 June 2021). Source URL https://www.bis.gov.in/index.php/standards/technical-department/national-standards/ resolves to BIS site (generic standards page — not directly about IS 16169 but publisher is official). Acceptable as a general authority reference.

CRITICAL IEC STANDARD NUMBERS ARE SWAPPED in standards_or_laws field. Fragment states 'IS 16221 (Part 1 & 2) (based on IEC 62116)' and 'IS 16169 (based on IEC 62109)' — these are WRONG. Confirmed correct mappings (multiple official BIS/crsbis.in sources, 2026-06-11): IS 16221 (Part 2):2015 = IEC 62109-2:2011 (safety of power converters); IS 16169:2019 = IEC 62116:2014 (anti-islanding test procedure). Additionally, IS 17980:2022/IEC 62891:2020 (MPPT efficiency) is now required under BIS CRS (crsbis.in Item 48) but is absent from this fragment. Source URL https://www.bis.gov.in/other-services/bis-certification/compulsory-registration-scheme/ returns BIS homepage (soft-404). Correct CRS product list URL: https://www.crsbis.in/BIS/products-bis.do

Multiple issues. (1) ALMM INVERTER CLAIM IS UNVERIFIED/LIKELY WRONG: The fragment states ALMM listing is mandatory for inverters in government/subsidy projects. Official MNRE ALMM page (confirmed 2026-06-11) shows ALMM List-I = Modules and List-II = Cells ONLY — no inverter ALMM list exists in the published MNRE framework. A third-party source (surgepv.com) mentions inverter ALMM for PM Surya Ghar but without citing any MNRE order number; AZB Partners regulatory deep-dive and legalitysimplified.com confirm List-II is only for PV cells. MNRE order number cited in fragment ('O.M. No. 283/18/2017-GRID SOLAR') is plausible but not independently confirmed as covering inverters. (2) BCD RATE CONFIRMED CORRECT: 20% BCD on solar inverters (HS 85044090) is confirmed by multiple sources including pvtech.org and cusbuzz.com; this rate has been in place since 2021. (3) DISCOM approval section is substantively correct. (4) Source URL https://mnre.gov.in/approved-list-of-models-manufacturers-almm/ returns HTTP 404. Correct URL: https://mnre.gov.in/en/approved-list-of-models-and-manufacturers-almm/
